data.name: The Photographer (Nymphs)
data.detailed_description:
Story Plot: After graduating from university, you start to work as a photographer in a small agency. But after a business trip, your boss requests you to let a Japanese model live with you for a short time. But your apartment is only big enough for a small bed. Furthermore, he wants you to turn her into a slut for his own scheme. What will you do then?

Depending on your choices, the game will lead you to one of these routes:

  • Gentleman Route: You keep being nice and try to help the women. At the end of the story, you’ll be able to choose one of the women or all of them.

  • Jerk Route: Even though you act like a jerk, you still try to help the women in secret. At the end of the story, you’ll be able to choose one of the women or all of them.

  • Sharing Route: You act like a jerk and share the women with other guys.

  • NTR Route: You have to watch other guys fooling around with the women.

The Photographer is an Erotic Visual Novel (Eroge) with multiple routes and multiple endings:

  • If you hate NTR (Netorare), you only need to stop the other guys from touching your women.

  • If you're okay with sharing, you can let the other guys have fun with your women.

  • But if you let everything get out of your control, you'll lose everything!

Notice:

  • If you can't have the endings you want, please use the walkthroughs: one with preview images (you will be able to know how to reach the scenes you want faster) or one without preview images (it won't spoil the story). The walkthroughs are in the game folder. The default location on Windows is: C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\The Photographer (Nymphs).

Since The Photographer is still being developed, the price of it in the Early Access is lower than the expected price when the full version is out:

  • v1.1 (initial release): 90% of the expected price.

  • v1.2 (add more scenes for Himawari, Isabelle, Monika, Julieta): 95% of the expected price.

  • v1.3 (add Harem Ending, Sharing Ending & NTR Ending): 100% of the expected price.

The game will be automatically updated for everyone who has already been owning it. Therefore, the sooner you buy The Photographer, the cheaper it is for you!

Thank you for playing The Photographer.

I'm very appreciative of your feedback after playing so I can make it better in my future projects.

Regards!

data.short_description: In The Photographer, you can have a happy ending (Romance Ending or Harem Ending), a neutral ending (Sharing Ending) or a sad ending (NTR Ending) depending on how you play.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 1.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

最低配備:

  • 處理器: 1.0 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
